imagePrompts.prompt: Platform Goal: Create one image asset for both Pinterest and X. It must work as a Pinterest Pin cover and as an X image-hook post that can anchor a prompt thread. Hero Subject: fictional adult K-pop editorial model with long espresso hair, dewy skin and sleeveless high-neck outfit. Scene / Context: futuristic room made of crumpled silver foil, eye-level seated pose, cool reflections. Source Recipe Translation: fictional K-pop silver-foil editorial portrait. Preserve these source mechanics: high-quality photo/digital render, crumpled silver metallic foil room, glass-skin beauty lighting, futuristic fashion editorial. Concrete social variant uses fictional adult K-pop editorial model with long espresso hair, dewy skin and sleeveless high-neck outfit in futuristic room made of crumpled silver foil, eye-level seated pose, cool reflections. Composition: vertical 4:5 or 2:3 social-poster composition with a strong central focal subject and clean negative space; Pinterest-first vertical 4:5 or 2:3 unless the source layout requires otherwise; keep the main subject readable in a small thumbnail and center-safe for X crop previews. Style System: high-quality photo/digital render, crumpled silver metallic foil room, glass-skin beauty lighting, futuristic fashion editorial; polished editorial finish, strong first-glance contrast, clean hierarchy, no raw prompt text shown in the image. Visible Text: no visible text; English-only readable text if text is part of the design; otherwise no visible text.
